title: Mentor Guide — Day 11 — Opportunity Analysis
coachingObjective: Help participants see financial advice as a venture — not a job.

timing.preSession: Review facilitator guide and deck speaker notes

discussionQuestions: When did the room shift from internship to venture?
Who still sees AIA as employer vs platform?
How does Week 2 evidence support this business model?
coachingTips: Speak SPIKE — market, problem, demand, impact, income
Do not introduce products or compensation today
